python - <<'PY'
from agent_kit.store.sqlite import SQLiteStore
from agent_kit.tool_kit import ToolContext, registry
import agent_kit.tools.editorial_reads  # noqa
store=SQLiteStore(':memory:')
epic=store.create_epic(title='T', goal='G', body='# T\n\n## Goal\n\nNeedle\n')
turn=store.create_turn(epic_id=epic['id'], triggered_by_message_ids=[])
fb=store.create_feedback(kind='style', content='Short.', source='explicit_save_request')
obs=store.create_feedback(kind='friction', content='Hard.', source='agent_observation', turn_id=turn['id'], context_snapshot={'user_message':'u'})
ctx=store.load_hot_context(None)
tool_ctx=ToolContext(store=store, turn_id=turn['id'], events=[])
print('hot_keys=' + ','.join(sorted(ctx)))
print('active_feedback=' + ','.join(row['id'] for row in ctx['active_feedback']))
print('observations=' + ','.join(row['id'] for row in ctx['unresolved_observations']))
print('outline_tool=' + registry.invoke('get_body_outline', tool_ctx, {'epic_id': epic['id']}).result['outline']['sections'][0]['name'])
print('search_tool=' + registry.invoke('search_in_body', tool_ctx, {'epic_id': epic['id'], 'query': 'needle'}).result['results'][0]['section'])
PY
